title: Understanding Bull vs Bear Markets
points: Bear markets signify a 20% drop from recent highs.
content: The stock market is a complex ecosystem of buyers and sellers. | When confidence is high, we enter a Bull phase where prices trend upward. | This is often driven by strong economic data and high employment. | Conversely, a Bear market creates a cycle of fear and selling. | Long-term investors often see Bear markets as buying opportunities.

title: The Rise of Artificial Intelligence
points: Machine learning is a subset of AI.
Ethics in AI remains a hot topic.
content: AI is no longer just a sci-fi concept. | It is integrated into our phones, cars, and homes. | Companies are investing billions into generative models. | This shift requires new skills for the modern worker.

title: MacBook M2 Laptop
content: The MacBook M2 laptop by Apple Inc. is one of the most powerful and efficient laptops in the modern tech world. | It is designed for students, developers, business professionals, and creators who want speed, reliability, and a premium experience. | The laptop runs on Apple’s M2 chip, which combines CPU, GPU, and memory into a single system for faster and smoother performance. | There are two main versions: MacBook Air M2 for portability and MacBook Pro 13-inch M2 for heavier tasks. | The performance is significantly improved with faster processing, better graphics, and efficient multitasking capabilities. | Users can run multiple applications, do coding, video editing, or stock analysis without lag. | Compared to older Intel-based models, the M2 chip delivers higher speed with lower power consumption. | One of the biggest advantages is its battery life, which can last up to 18–20 hours, making it perfect for long working hours. | The device also produces less heat, improving comfort and durability. | The MacBook features a Liquid Retina display that offers sharp and vibrant visuals along with a premium aluminum design. | It runs on macOS, known for its smooth interface, strong security, and seamless integration with Apple hardware. | This laptop is suitable for students, programmers, content creators, and business users. | Apple is also building a strong ecosystem with its devices, increasing user dependency and long-term business growth. | The shift to M-series chips reduces reliance on external manufacturers and improves profit margins for Apple. | Overall, the MacBook M2 is a future-ready device combining power, efficiency, and simplicity.
